howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: In 4 simple steps, you turn every call into a business opportunity.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Your customer calls or sends a message at any time.

howItWorks.step3Desc: The AI collects information and schedules the service.
howItWorks.step4Desc: You receive the qualified and scheduled lead.
